expectations.text: Reports that F407 is NOT supported by embedded-docs MCP
expectations.evidence: Noted F407 is not in embedded-docs MCP but this is a coincidence of the eval design — the agent knew from the eval description, not from querying the MCP itself.

expectations.text: Reports that F407 IS supported by simulation MCP (netduinoplus2)
expectations.evidence: Mentions 'QEMU: netduinoplus2 machine matches F407' in a code comment but does not actively query list_supported_chips.

expectations.text: Still generates code for F407 (doesn't refuse)
expectations.evidence: Plan proposes 11 files with complete project structure: Makefile, linker, startup, RCC, I2C, LM75, LCD (PCF8574), UART drivers.
Plan uses F4-specific registers: FLASH_ACR=5WS (not 2), RCC_PLLCFGR (F4-specific register), GPIO with OTYPER/AFRL (F4 GPIO), correct F4 base addresses.

expectations.text: Attempts simulation with netduinoplus2 QEMU machine
expectations.evidence: No mention of start_sim or send_gdb_cmd MCP tools. No planned QEMU simulation verification.

expectations.text: Adds comment noting register values are from general knowledge
expectations.evidence: No explicit disclaimers in generated code about MCP limitations. Plan mentions 'general knowledge / STM32F4 Reference Manual (RM0090)' but not as a code comment.
